script: We're launching Pronouncly and you can start by clicking Google Login to enter the product and begin the guided flow. Continue with Google to keep sign-in quick. From here, choose the Japanese course to continue deeper into the main product experience. Next, choose the Japanese level that matches the learner's starting point.
